title: Professional Real Estate & Property Dealing Website

requirements.text: Create a Motoko backend actor with a Property data model including: id, title, description, price (Nat), squareFootage (Nat), location (text), propertyType ("Residential" | "Commercial"), amenities (array of text), imageUrls (array of text), isFeatured (Bool), and createdAt (Int). Expose CRUD functions: addProperty, updateProperty, deleteProperty, getProperty, getAllProperties, getFeaturedProperties, and searchProperties (filter by type, maxBudget, location keyword).

quotes: Property Management System: A dynamic 'Listings' section where I can easily add, edit, and delete property profiles including images, price, square footage, location, and amenities.

acceptanceCriteria: addProperty stores a new listing and returns the generated ID
updateProperty modifies an existing listing by ID
deleteProperty removes a listing by ID
getAllProperties returns the full list of properties
getFeaturedProperties returns only properties with isFeatured = true
searchProperties filters by propertyType, maxBudget, and location keyword (case-insensitive partial match)

requirements.text: Create a Motoko backend actor function to store inquiry/lead submissions with fields: propertyId (text), visitorName (text), visitorEmail (text), visitorPhone (text), message (text), submittedAt (Int). Expose submitInquiry and getAllInquiries functions so the admin can view leads.

quotes: Lead Generation: Integration of 'Book a Visit' or 'Inquiry' forms on every individual property page that sends data directly to my email.

acceptanceCriteria: submitInquiry persists the lead and returns a success confirmation
getAllInquiries returns all stored inquiries
Inquiry records include propertyId, visitor details, message, and timestamp

requirements.text: Build a multi-page React frontend with client-side routing supporting: Home (/), All Listings (/listings), Property Detail (/listings/:id), About Us (/about), Contact (/contact), and Admin Dashboard (/admin).
acceptanceCriteria: All six routes render distinct page components without full page reload
Navigation links in the header correctly route to each page
Navigating to /listings/:id with a valid ID shows that property's detail page
404 fallback route exists for unmatched paths

requirements.text: Build the Home page with: (1) a full-width hero banner using the generated hero image, a bold headline, a sub-headline, and a search bar with dropdowns for Property Type (Residential/Commercial), Max Budget (range options), and Location (text input) plus a Search button that navigates to /listings with query params; (2) a 'Featured Properties' horizontal carousel showing featured listings (image, title, price, location, type badge, View Details button); (3) a 'Why Choose Us' section with 3–4 icon+text cards highlighting trust signals (e.g., expert agents, verified listings, fast deals, local market knowledge).

quotes: Home: Featuring a hero banner with a search bar, 'Featured Properties' carousel, and a brief 'Why Choose Us' section.

acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner renders the generated hero image as background with overlay text and search bar visible on all screen sizes
Search bar dropdowns for Type and Budget are functional; Location is a free-text input
Clicking Search navigates to /listings and pre-fills filter state from query params
Featured Properties carousel shows at least 3 cards and supports horizontal scroll/swipe
Why Choose Us section displays at least 3 cards with icons and descriptive text

requirements.text: Build the All Listings page (/listings) with a sidebar/top filter panel (Property Type, Max Budget, Location) and a responsive grid of property cards. Each card shows: thumbnail image, title, price, square footage, location, type badge, and a 'View Details' button linking to /listings/:id. Apply active filters from URL query params on load and update URL when filters change.

quotes: All Listings: A grid-style layout showing all available properties with clear 'View Details' buttons.

acceptanceCriteria: Grid shows all properties returned by getAllProperties when no filters are active
Changing filter values re-queries searchProperties and updates the displayed cards
Filter state is reflected in the URL query string
Each card's View Details button navigates to the correct /listings/:id route
Empty state message shown when no properties match the filters

requirements.text: Build the Property Detail page (/listings/:id) with: (1) a multi-image gallery (thumbnail strip + large preview); (2) full property details (title, price, sqft, location, type, amenities list, full description); (3) an embedded map placeholder section labeled 'Location Map' (using a static map image or iframe placeholder since external map APIs are not supported natively); (4) a 'Book a Visit / Inquiry' form with fields for Name, Email, Phone, Message, and a Submit button that calls submitInquiry on the backend and shows a success confirmation.

quotes: Property Detail Page: A template page for individual listings featuring an image gallery, detailed description, Google Maps integration, and a contact form.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /listings/:id fetches and displays the correct property data
Image gallery shows all imageUrls; clicking a thumbnail updates the large preview
All property fields (price, sqft, location, type, amenities, description) are displayed
Inquiry form validates required fields (Name, Email, Message) before submission
On successful submitInquiry call, a success message is displayed to the user
Map section renders a styled placeholder or static map image

requirements.text: Build the About Us page with sections: a hero banner with tagline, a 'Our Story' narrative paragraph, a stats row (e.g., Years in Business, Properties Sold, Happy Clients, Cities Covered), a 'Meet the Team' section with 3 placeholder agent cards (photo, name, title), and a trust-building 'Our Values' section with 3–4 icon+text items.

quotes: About Us: A section to build trust, highlighting local expertise and years of experience.

acceptanceCriteria: About page renders at /about with all described sections
Stats row displays at least 4 metrics with numbers and labels
Team section shows 3 agent cards using the generated agent placeholder images
Our Values section displays at least 3 values with icons

requirements.text: Build the Contact page (/contact) with: a contact form (Name, Email, Phone, Subject, Message fields) that submits via submitInquiry with propertyId set to 'general'; an office info block showing a placeholder phone number, email address, and office address; and a map placeholder section consistent with the Property Detail page style.

quotes: Contact: A dedicated page with a contact form, phone number, and office location.

acceptanceCriteria: Contact page renders at /contact
Form validates Name, Email, and Message as required before submission
On successful submission, a confirmation message is displayed
Office info block shows phone, email, and address in a styled card
Map placeholder section is present and styled consistently with Property Detail page

requirements.text: Build an Admin Dashboard page (/admin) with two tabs: 'Manage Listings' and 'Inquiries'. Manage Listings tab: displays all properties in a table with Edit and Delete actions; includes an 'Add New Property' button that opens a modal/form for creating or editing a property (all fields: title, description, price, sqft, location, type, amenities, imageUrls as comma-separated input, isFeatured toggle). Inquiries tab: displays all submitted leads in a table with columns for property, visitor name, email, phone, message, and timestamp.

quotes: Property Management System: A dynamic 'Listings' section where I can easily add, edit, and delete property profiles

acceptanceCriteria: Admin page is accessible at /admin
Manage Listings tab lists all properties with Edit and Delete buttons
Clicking Delete calls deleteProperty and removes the row from the list
Add/Edit modal form has all property fields and submits correctly (addProperty or updateProperty)
Inquiries tab lists all leads with all relevant fields displayed
Both tabs use React Query for data fetching with loading and error states

requirements.text: Implement a persistent global navigation header with the Prime Properties logo/wordmark, nav links (Home, Listings, About, Contact), and a prominent 'List Your Property' CTA button. Include a responsive mobile hamburger menu. Add a footer with company name, quick links, contact info placeholder, and a copyright line.

quotes: Mobile Optimized: The site must be fully responsive and easy to navigate on smartphones.

acceptanceCriteria: Header is present on all pages and sticks to the top on scroll
Mobile hamburger menu toggles a drawer with all nav links on screens < 768px
Footer appears on all pages with quick links, contact info, and copyright
Logo uses the generated logo image

requirements.text: Apply a consistent design system across all pages: Deep Navy (#0A1628) as the primary brand color, White (#FFFFFF) as background, Gold (#C9A84C) as accent for CTAs, borders, and highlights, and light gray (#F5F5F5) for section backgrounds. Use a clean sans-serif font stack. Ensure all pages are fully responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop) with appropriate spacing, card shadows, and hover states on interactive elements.

quotes: Style: Modern, clean, and trustworthy. Use a professional color palette (e.g., Deep Navy, White, and Gold or Forest Green accents).
Mobile Optimized: The site must be fully responsive

acceptanceCriteria: Deep Navy, White, and Gold palette is applied consistently across all pages
CTA buttons use Gold background with Navy or White text
All pages render correctly on mobile (320px+), tablet (768px+), and desktop (1280px+)
Property cards and UI elements have consistent border-radius, shadow, and hover transitions
Typography uses a clean sans-serif font with clear hierarchy (headings, body, captions)

requirements.text: Render the generated static images (hero banner, logo, agent placeholders, property sample images) from the frontend/public/assets/generated directory and reference them in the appropriate page components.

quotes: Visuals: High-quality imagery, clear typography (Sans-serif), and plenty of white space to make the property photos pop.

acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner image is rendered on the Home page as a background
Logo image appears in the navigation header
Agent placeholder images are used in the About Us team section
Sample property images are used as default listing thumbnails in seed/demo data

constraints: Email delivery is not supported on-platform; inquiry form data must be stored in the backend canister and displayed in the Admin Dashboard instead of being emailed
Google Maps iframe integration is not supported; use a styled static map placeholder or a Google Maps static image URL instead
All Motoko logic must remain in a single backend/main.mo actor file
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
No external authentication; the Admin Dashboard does not require login for this build
nonGoals: Email notifications or SMTP integration for inquiry submissions
Internet Identity or user authentication for the admin panel
Real-time property availability updates or WebSocket features
Payment processing or online booking with payment
SEO meta-tag optimization or server-side rendering
City/region-specific SEO tailoring (no specific city was provided)

required: Wide cinematic hero image of a modern luxury residential building exterior at golden hour with a clean sky backdrop, warm tones (hero-banner.dim_1920x900.jpg)
Minimal professional real estate brand logo wordmark with a small house icon, deep navy and gold colors on white background (prime-properties-logo.dim_400x120.png)
Professional headshot-style portrait of a male real estate agent in a suit, neutral background (agent-male-1.dim_400x400.jpg)
Professional headshot-style portrait of a female real estate agent in business attire, neutral background (agent-female-1.dim_400x400.jpg)
Professional headshot-style portrait of a second female real estate agent smiling, neutral background (agent-female-2.dim_400x400.jpg)
High-quality photo of a modern spacious living room interior with large windows and neutral decor (property-sample-1.dim_800x600.jpg)
Aerial view of a contemporary suburban residential house with a manicured garden (property-sample-2.dim_800x600.jpg)
Sleek modern office building exterior with glass facade in an urban setting (property-sample-3.dim_800x600.jpg)
Bright open-plan commercial retail space interior with polished floors and high ceilings (property-sample-4.dim_800x600.jpg)
